purpose: Analyze the underlying causes of an event or situation — moving beyond symptoms to structural, political, and economic drivers.
writingRules: Distinguish between proximate causes (trigger) and root causes (systemic)
Each cause must be supported by evidence, not speculation
Show how causes interconnect — root causes rarely act alone
End with implications — what addressing the root cause would require
seoRules: Structure as ordered list for depth analysis rich results
Key causal relationships should be in paragraph text
Use FAQ schema for causal chain questions
